content: Extend ThemeContext to support Light/Dark mode (24 theme combinations)
Create Light/Dark mode toggle button in navigation
Define light mode color tokens and update CSS variables
Create base 3D infrastructure (Canvas wrapper, lazy loading, fallbacks)
Implement 3D Hero section (particle system or geometric shapes)
Add 3D elements to Work page (project visualizations)
Add 3D elements to Tools page (lab chamber lighting)
Add 3D elements to About page (brand architecture 3D stack)
Implement page transition system with AnimatePresence
Add smooth scroll functionality with anchors
Create Advanced Interactive Footer (multi-column, mini-map, animations)
Optimize performance (lazy loading, code splitting, reduced motion)
Comprehensive testing of all new features
